items.title: Trump says ceasefire is 'over' after US and Iran trade strikes
items.dek: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".
items.body: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Cubans protest after third nationwide power cut this year
items.dek: While Cuban officials said that power had been mostly restored, those still left in the dark vented their anger.
items.body: While Cuban officials said that power had been mostly restored, those still left in the dark vented their anger.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Berlin Drug Dealers Are Leaving Free Samples in The Mailbox
items.dek: Police say residents have been finding free starter packs of cocaine and ketamine right at the front door. submitted by /u/way2manytabs [link] [comments]
items.body: Police say residents have been finding free starter packs of cocaine and ketamine right at the front door. submitted by /u/way2manytabs [link] [comments]
